# Shoaib Alam

> AI Engineer at JPMC | NLP Researcher (IIT Gandhinagar) | Pioneer of Fiduciary-Grade Hybrid RAG for Institutional Finance

Shoaib Alam is a specialized AI and Data Engineer with a strong academic research background in Natural Language Processing (NLP) from IIT Gandhinagar. He currently designs and implements high-precision, fiduciary-grade hybrid Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems for institutional finance at JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPMC).

## Core Information
- **Full Name**: Shoaib Alam
- **Role**: AI Engineer, JPMC (Fiduciary-Grade AI & Institutional Finance)
- **Previous Role**: Data Engineer II & I at Nike (Data and Artificial Intelligence)
- **Education**: Master of Technology (MTech) in Computer Science, IIT Gandhinagar (9.67 CGPA)
- **Location**: Bangalore, Karnataka, India
- **Email**: alamshoaib134@gmail.com
- **Portfolio**: [https://shoaibalam.vercel.app/](https://shoaibalam.vercel.app/)
- **GitHub**: [https://github.com/alamshoaib134](https://github.com/alamshoaib134)
- **LinkedIn**: [https://linkedin.com/in/alamshoaib134](https://linkedin.com/in/alamshoaib134)
- **Twitter/X**: [https://x.com/alamshoaib134](https://x.com/alamshoaib134)
- **Resume**: [Download PDF Resume](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1iDi6CSnsAykYviIjS-7nHFm77GMDUkfz)

## Areas of Expertise
- **AI & NLP Engineering**: Fiduciary-grade hybrid RAG architectures, LLM fine-tuning, prompt engineering, semantic retrieval optimization.
- **Data & ML Engineering**: High-throughput ETL pipelines, feature stores, data orchestration (Spark, Airflow), model deployment.
- **Full-Stack AI Applications**: Next.js, React, TypeScript, FastAPI, Python.
- **Automation & Integrations**: Web scraping, Chrome extensions, browser automation (Selenium), API engineering.

## Key Contributions & Academic Research

### LEGOBench: Scientific Leaderboard Generation Benchmark (Findings of EMNLP 2024)
- **Summary**: A benchmark framework evaluating LLMs and scientific encoder models on automated scientific leaderboard generation.
- **Paper**: [arXiv:2401.06233](https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.06233)
- **Code**: [LEGOBench Repository](https://github.com/lingo-iitgn/LEGOBench)
- **Dataset**: [OSF Dataset](https://osf.io/9v2py/)
- **Scale**: Built using 22 years of arXiv preprint metadata paired with 11,000+ machine learning leaderboards from PapersWithCode.
- **Tasks Evaluated**: RPG (Ranking Papers based on Content and Graph), RPLM (Ranking Papers by Prompting LMs), LGPLM (Leaderboard Entries Generation).

## Professional Experience

### JPMC | AI Engineer (Apr 2026 - Present)
*Fiduciary-Grade AI & Institutional Finance | Bangalore, India*
- Designing high-precision hybrid RAG frameworks combining dense semantic search and sparse keyword retrieval.
- Deploying secure, high-throughput LLM pipelines under strict fiduciary compliance and institutional standards.
- Collaborating with finance teams to integrate state-of-the-art NLP models into production.

### Nike | Data Engineer II & I (Jun 2023 - Apr 2026)
*Data and Artificial Intelligence | Bangalore, India*
- Led and architected large-scale ETL pipelines, AI/ML data infrastructure, and feature stores.
- Developed automated data validation, quality monitoring tools, and workflows using Jenkins and Apache Airflow.
- Contributed to global AI-powered e-commerce search and recommendation systems.

## Primary Projects
- **git-secret-scanner** ([GitHub](https://github.com/alamshoaib134/git-secret-scanner)): Security scanning tool to detect/prevent credential leaks in Git repos. (TypeScript, Node.js)
- **AI-Image-Search** ([GitHub](https://github.com/alamshoaib134/AI-Image-Search)): Machine learning application for semantic image search and visual similarity. (Python, PyTorch, CV)
- **Table-Mapper-AI** ([GitHub](https://github.com/alamshoaib134/Table-Mapper-AI)): Intelligent tabular data extraction and mapping tool. (Python, ML)
- **Al-Quran** ([GitHub](https://github.com/alamshoaib134/Al-Quran)): Quranic NLP analysis, search interface, and statistical visualizations. (Python, NLP)
- **auto-quora-answer-bot-using-llm** ([GitHub](https://github.com/alamshoaib134/auto-quora-answer-bot-using-llm)): LLM-powered answer generation and browser automation. (Python, OpenAI, Selenium)
- **chat-with-CSV** ([GitHub](https://github.com/alamshoaib134/chat-with-CSV)): LLaMA-powered interactive document chatbot. (Python, LLaMA, NLP)
- **nlp_pipeline** ([GitHub](https://github.com/alamshoaib134/nlp_pipeline)): Jenkins/Airflow integrated end-to-end NLP workflow. (Python, Jenkins, Airflow)

## Technical Stack
- **Languages**: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, C++, SQL
- **Frameworks & Libraries**: PyTorch, HuggingFace, LangChain, LlamaIndex, React, Next.js, FastAPI, Node.js
- **Data & DevOps**: Apache Spark, Apache Airflow, Jenkins, Git, Docker, Selenium
